Text.Text: Ship Finder - Alphabetical Catalogue
Alphabetical ship finder
Choose the first letter of a ship in the current province. Counts are live.
Alphabetical ship finder
Choose an exact ship. Blank rows mean that the current page has fewer ships.
[X] Close
◀◀ Earlier letters
Later letters ▶▶
[A-Z] Letter index

{(function() local letter="A"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="B"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="C"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="D"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="G"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="H"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="I"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="J"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="K"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="L"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="M"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="N"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="O"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="P"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Q"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="R"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="S"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="T"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="U"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="V"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="W"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="X"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Y"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Z"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); if not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$") then count=count+1 end end end; return "Other ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+1]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+2]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+3]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+4]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}
{(function() local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; return page>0 and "◀ Previous ships" or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then count=count+1 end end end; return count>((page+1)*4) and "More ships ▶" or "" end)()}
